title: Eraserheads live in Los Angeles - May 2, 1997 [Full Show w/ Enhanced Audio]
creator: EraserHeads
description:
Eraserheads performs live to a sold-out crowd at The Palace, Hollywood, Los Angeles, CA on May 2, 1997 Friday. This was their first ever US show!

Show produced by King In A Productions.

US Tour 1997 personnel:
Ely Buendia - lead vocals, guitars
Marcus Adoro - guitars, backing vocals
Buddy Zabala - bass guitar, backing vocals
Raimund Marasigan - drums, backing vocals
Jessica Zafra - band/tour manager 
Earnest  Mangalubnan - asst. tour manager / merchandise
Romel 'Sancho' Sanchez - backline tech
Mark Villena - backline tech
Jaime Godinez - sound engineer

Videotaped by schizo & Laurence "shoegazer" Macaspac

Notes:
I originally uploaded a short clip of this show on my personal YT page on 12/1/2006. I also created & uploaded a full, 'docu-style' home video of the entire show with soundcheck & other pre-show footage broken into 15 parts on 8/29/2008, This one is just the full concert only but I kinda 'enhanced' the audio. The original audio was too bassy & had lots of clipping, clicks, etc.
Anyway, enjoy this new upload.

Eraserheads : Database - http://www.eheads-database.com
Wikipedia - https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Eraserh...

Courtesy of The Schizo Archives
Check out my personal YouTube channel:    / schizo102  

#Eraserheads #LosAngeles #Hollywood
